Whatever the sign be, onlyV enus (sukra) is the wife and
Mars (Kuja) is the husband. It is essential to know the
Characteristics, cruel nature, exaltation and debilitation,
conjunction and cominations of these two planets.

102 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
When one looks at a female chart, if Mars (Kuja) is
posited in his exaltation sign Makara (Capricorn) and Rahu is
also posited there she gets husband of follishness. In case this
Mars (Kuja) had the Moon (Chandra) along with him, the
husband would be traveling in nature. If the Mars (Kuja) had
Sun (Ravi) with him, she gets an arrogant, short tempered and
egoistic husband.
